name: Loss Ledger Circles
summary: Sheresh circles that record deaths, disappearances, and irrecoverable losses so survival decisions remain socially remembered.
motive: Prevent the harsh arithmetic of survival from erasing grief, accountability, or cautionary memory.
power_relations: Morally influential but not supreme; often intersect with Dome Stewards and route wardens after tragedy
visible_membership_base: Record keepers, kin witnesses, elder mediators, memorial attendants.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: They are strongest when the community still wants to remember; prolonged crisis tempts people to reduce names to numbers.
